## Source: ghsa-malware (a510655095a5e170566ad73dd2b606be581f6d37fd4a71f6deefa9674fb0010c)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (705c314b786f674b8b06825a6211d1595db25022404041a4d8760b4094e863e1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'queenbee-plugin' @ 99.0.7 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

---

Credit: [OpenSSF](https://github.com/ossf/malicious-packages) ([source](https://github.com/ossf/malicious-packages/blob/9fbb5fba02ba2f02395d3d2d43c31b2c482b7a9d/osv/malicious/rubygems/queenbee-plugin/MAL-2025-192914.json))

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
